provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Agricultural Charges Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation
Application of the Act to an agreement
provisions.content:
3. Application of the Act to an agreement
Any written agreement between a farmer and the bank under which moneys are payable, or may become payable, to the bank, whether on its own account or as agent for the Government, may provide that this Act shall apply to the agreement; and if it does so provide, then this Act shall apply.

provisions.title: Certificate of indebtedness
provisions.content:
4. Certificate of indebtedness
(1) Whenever an agreement is concluded, the farmer and an agent or servant of the bank authorised thereto shall certify as correct a certificate of indebtedness which shall contain the following—

definitions.definition: crops or horticultural produce whether future, growing, or severed from the land, and after severance whether subjected to any treatment or manufacture or not
assigned to it in section 2(1) of the National Development Bank Act (Cap. 74:05)
the National Development Bank as established by the National Development Bank Act
a person to whom or through whom agricultural produce is required to be sold in accordance with the provisions of section 7
the certificate referred to in section 4
a person who is engaged in agriculture
the contracts known in Setswana as " go fisa ", and any similar contract
